notes: Intents are stable behavior categories, not topic labels.
Router must always select one of these intents (or fall back to 'research').
Do not auto-create new intents from user tasks.

intents.description: Gather information, constraints, documentation, or requirements. Use when the task needs reading, searching, or clarifying unknowns.
examples: Research Bitcoin Testnet integration options
Look up best practices for REST API auth and rate limits
Compare datasets and identify suitability
Find libraries needed for a feature

intents.description: Architect structure and interfaces: API endpoints, schemas, models, workflows, and system diagrams. Use when producing a blueprint rather than writing code.
examples: Define API endpoints and their request/response formats
Design database schema for wallets and transactions
Define a transaction log model and event format
Create service boundaries and module interfaces

intents.description: Implement logic and code: routes, algorithms, integrations, transformations. Use when creating or changing real code behavior.
examples: Implement 90/10 fund split logic
Add wallet creation and funding routes
Integrate Bitcoin Testnet client and broadcast flow
Write preprocessing code for a dataset

intents.description: Test and verify correctness: unit tests, integration tests, metrics evaluation, and scenario checks. Use when measuring quality or correctness.
examples: Write unit tests for endpoints
Test 90/10 split with edge cases
Evaluate model accuracy/precision/recall
Run regression checks after changes

intents.description: Prepare environments and release: staging/prod deployment, containers, configs, secrets, CI/CD steps. Use when shipping or running the system.
examples: Deploy API to staging
Write Dockerfile and compose setup
Configure env vars and secrets
Set up CI pipeline for tests + deploy

intents.description: Observe and maintain: logging, tracing, metrics, error handling, performance tuning, and long-term upkeep. Use when improving stability and operability.
examples: Implement API request logging
Add structured transaction logs
Add rate limiting and audit trails
Debug router failures and improve fallbacks
